infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OrbitPay needs camera access for KYC document scanning and selfie verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OrbitPay needs photo library access for document uploads and profile photo.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: OrbitPay uses Face ID to provide secure and convenient authentication.
infoPlist.NSLocalAuthenticationUsageDescription: OrbitPay uses biometric authentication to securely verify your identity.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: OrbitPay uses contacts to easily find people to transfer money to.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OrbitPay uses the microphone for video KYC verification.
